options.name: --color
options.description: Colored output. Enabled by default. Set flag to false or use NO_COLOR=1 to disable. (default true)

options.name: --completion
options.description: Generates shell completion script.

options.name: --concurrency
options.description: Limit number of tasks to run concurrently.

options.name: --dir
options.description: Sets the directory in which Task will execute and look for a Taskfile.

options.name: --disable-fuzzy
options.description: Disables fuzzy matching for task names.

options.name: --dry
options.description: Compiles and prints tasks in the order that they would be run, without executing them.

options.name: --exit-code
options.description: Pass-through the exit code of the task command.

options.name: --experiments
options.description: Lists all the available experiments and whether or not they are enabled.

options.name: --failfast
options.description: When running tasks in parallel, stop all tasks if one fails.

options.name: --force
options.description: Forces execution even when the task is up-to-date.

options.name: --global
options.description: Runs global Taskfile, from $HOME/{T,t}askfile.{yml,yaml}.

options.name: --help
options.description: Shows Task usage.

options.name: --init
options.description: Creates a new Taskfile.yml in the current folder.

options.name: --insecure
options.description: Forces Task to download Taskfiles over insecure connections.

options.name: --interactive
options.description: Prompt for missing required variables.

options.name: --interval
options.description: Interval to watch for changes.

options.name: --json
options.description: Formats task list as JSON.

options.name: --list
options.description: Lists tasks with description of current Taskfile.

options.name: --list-all
options.description: Lists tasks with or without a description.

options.name: --nested
options.description: Nest namespaces when listing tasks as JSON

options.name: --no-status
options.description: Ignore status when listing tasks as JSON

options.name: --output
options.description: Sets output style: [interleaved|group|prefixed].

options.name: --output-group-begin
options.description: Message template to print before a task's grouped output.

options.name: --output-group-end
options.description: Message template to print after a task's grouped output.

options.name: --output-group-error-only
options.description: Swallow output from successful tasks.

options.name: --parallel
options.description: Executes tasks provided on command line in parallel.

options.name: --silent
options.description: Disables echoing.

options.name: --sort
options.description: Changes the order of the tasks when listed. [default|alphanumeric|none].

options.name: --status
options.description: Exits with non-zero exit code if any of the given tasks is not up-to-date.

options.name: --summary
options.description: Show summary about a task.

options.name: --taskfile
options.description: Choose which Taskfile to run. Defaults to "Taskfile.yml".

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Enables verbose mode.

options.name: --version
options.description: Show Task version.

options.name: --watch
options.description: Enables watch of the given task.

options.name: --yes
options.description: Assume "yes" as answer to all prompts.
